title: Trade Federation Minister
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Senatenute.jpg|thumb|[[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] during his time as [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] Minister in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]].]]

'''Trade Federation Minister''' was a position within the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], and was apparently equivalent to [[Senator/Legends|Senator]]. [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] served as the Trade Federation Minister during the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]]. After Gunray's ascension to [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Viceroy]] at the end of the conflict, his place was taken by [[Lott Dod/Legends|Lott Dod]]. Dod still held this position after the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 36|''Star Wars'' (1998) 36]] {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars (1998) 37|''Star Wars'' (1998) 37]]
